title: BTS’s “Dynamite” Becomes The First K-Pop Boy Group MV To Surpass 2.1 Billion Views
content:
BTS’s “Dynamite” has reached another impressive YouTube milestone! On June 24 at approximately 8 a.m. KST, the boy group’s music video for “Dynamite” surpassed 2.1 billion views, meaning that it took approximately five years, 10 months, two days, and 19 hours since its release on August 21, 2020 at 1 p.m. KST. It also only… Continue reading BTS’s “Dynamite” Becomes The First K-Pop Boy Group MV To Surpass 2.1 Billion Views
The post BTS’s “Dynamite” Becomes The First K-Pop Boy Group MV To Surpass 2.1 Billion Views appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BTS《Dynamite》MV观看量突破21亿，创K-POP男团纪录
facts_list: 2025年6月24日上午8点（KST），BTS《Dynamite》MV在YouTube观看量突破21亿次
该MV于2020年8月21日下午1点（KST）发布，历时约5年10个月2天19小时达成此里程碑
这是K-POP男团MV中首个达到21亿观看量的作品
summary_zh: BTS的热门歌曲《Dynamite》官方MV于6月24日上午8点（KST）在YouTube上突破21亿次观看，成为首支达到此里程碑的K-POP男团MV。该MV自2020年8月21日发布以来，历时约5年10个月2天19小时达成这一纪录。

summary_zh: NCT成员Mark Lee因穿着印有美国邦联旗图案的衬衫引发争议。邦联旗被视为种族主义象征，尤其在非裔美国人群体中具有冒犯性。SM娱乐随后发布官方道歉声明，承认该服装选择不当，并表示将加强艺人的历史教育。

title_zh: Hearts2Hearts新专辑《Lemon Tang》仅2天打破首周销量纪录

截至6月23日，根据Hanteo Chart数据，该专辑已打破自身首周销量纪录
summary_zh: SM娱乐新人女团Hearts2Hearts于6月22日携迷你专辑《Lemon Tang》回归，截至6月23日，仅用2天时间便根据Hanteo Chart数据打破了自身首周销量纪录。

title: Watch: RIIZE Shows You How To “Do your dance” In High-Energy Dance Practice Video
content:
RIIZE is back with an exciting new dance video! On June 23, RIIZE released the official dance practice video for “Do your dance,” the title track of their new mini album “II.” The newly released video offers a full view of the intense choreography for “Do your dance,” including the members’ skillful dance moves and… Continue reading Watch: RIIZE Shows You How To “Do your dance” In High-Energy Dance Practice Video
The post Watch: RIIZE Shows You How To “Do your dance” In High-Energy Dance Practice Video appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: RIIZE公开新曲《Do your dance》高能舞蹈练习视频
facts_list: 6月23日，RIIZE发布了迷你专辑《II》主打曲《Do your dance》的官方舞蹈练习视频
视频展示了成员们精湛的舞蹈动作和完整编舞
summary_zh: RIIZE于6月23日发布了新迷你专辑《II》主打曲《Do your dance》的官方舞蹈练习视频，视频完整呈现了高强度编舞和成员们的熟练舞技。

title: BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet
content:
BOYNEXTDOOR has just scored their first-ever top 20 album in the United States! On June 23 local time, Billboard announced that BOYNEXTDOOR’s new studio album “HOME” had debuted at No. 16 on its Top 200 Albums chart, which ranks the most popular albums in the United States. “HOME” has now become BOYNEXTDOOR’s highest-ranking album on… Continue reading BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet
The post BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BOYNEXTDOOR新专辑《HOME》首次进入Billboard 200前20，创美国最佳销量周
facts_list: 6月23日（当地时间），Billboard公布BOYNEXTDOOR新专辑《HOME》在Billboard 200专辑榜空降第16位
这是BOYNEXTDOOR首次进入该榜单前20名，并创下其在美国的最佳销量周
summary_zh: BOYNEXTDOOR的新专辑《HOME》于6月23日（当地时间）在Billboard 200专辑榜空降第16位，首次进入该榜单前20名，同时创下组合在美国的最佳销量周。
